SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BRITTANY LADIN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SIMONE FESSANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA LAU MANAGER. DEFENDANT SOPHIE LAU IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE (S) FILED. DEFENDANT(S) WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LADIN, BRITTANY FESSANT, SIMONE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP LAU, SOPHIE CARE OF LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,375.00, DEFENDANT(S) SHALL PAY BRITTANY LADIN AND SIMONE FESSANT JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Sophie Lau of LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP the Appellant.
Brittany Ladin and Simone Fessant the Respondents.

This cause came on regularly for Trial De Novo. Parties are sworn.

Respondent Brittany Ladin testifies on hers and Simone Fessant's behalf. No new exhibits were presented.

Appellant Sophie Lau testifies on behalf of LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP.
Exhibit 1(Group) - Multiple pages and documents.
Exhibit 2(Group) - Multiple color photographs.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk Julie Rumsey, Not Reported. (525)
